name: Doppelgänger Guise
explicitMods: 60% more Critical Strike Chance while Insane
Enemies Killed by your Hits are destroyed while Insane
47% less Physical and Chaos Damage Taken while Sane
Regenerate 10% Life over one second when Hit while Sane
flavourText: Within each of us exists a being of pure malice,
held back only by the lies we tell ourselves.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell skill will have a chance to be triggered when you are stunned. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.
explicitMods:
90% chance to Trigger Supported Spells when you are Stunned, or
Block a Stunning Hit
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Fire, Duration, Projectile, Orb

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a volcanic geyser at a location, which will repeatedly unleash projectiles sequentially over the surrounding area for a duration.
explicitMods: Maximum of 6 Geysers at a time
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts a ring of Lightning around you, followed by a larger Lightning nova. Each effect hits enemies caught in their area with Lightning Damage.
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: A wave of divine fire deals damage in a line, then creates Consecrated Ground and deals damage in an area around the targeted location. A larger shockwave then expands outwards, damaging enemies standing on Consecrated Ground that were not already hit.
explicitMods: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
+1.1 metres to radius of Consecrated Ground
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Strikes enemies in front of you with a surge of flame. If this ignites an enemy a large area of burning ground will be created under them. Your damage modifiers don't apply to this burning ground.
explicitMods:
Igniting Enemies creates Burning Ground, no more than once per second
Burning Ground deals 65% of Fire Damage per second of inflicted Ignite
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a wall of fire for a duration, which deals burning damage to everything in its area. Each enemy that enters the wall also receives a secondary burning debuff which persists for a short duration after leaving the wall. Any projectiles fired through the wall by you and allies deal added fire damage and apply the wall's secondary debuff on hit.
explicitMods: Deals 679.9 Base Fire Damage per second
Secondary Debuff Deals 2266.4 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
Maximum 4 Flame Walls at a time
Projectiles which pass through the wall deal 78 to 117 Added Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

craftedMods: Regenerate 3% of Life per second during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Nebulis
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Elemental Damage per 2% Quality
implicitMods: +3% to Quality of Socketed Cold Gems
explicitMods: 10% increased Elemental Damage per 1% Fire, Cold, or Lightning Resistance above 75%
flavourText: The vastness of the cosmos holds energies beyond comprehension,
should one have the fortitude to grasp them.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants armour to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 1026 additional Armour
You and nearby allies gain 49% more Armour
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.
explicitMods: Buff grants +26% Chance to Block Spell Damage while holding a Shield
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. Your life cannot be raised above low life other than by flasks, and while above low life, skills will cost life as well as mana.
explicitMods:
Life Recovery other than Flasks cannot Recover Life to above Low Life
When taking Damage from Hits, 40% of Life loss below half Life is Prevented, then 75% of Life loss prevented this way is lost over 4 seconds
Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to 40% of Base Mana Cost while not on Low Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: The Anvil
implicitMods: You can apply an additional Curse
explicitMods: +3% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage
Reflects 240 to 300 Physical Damage to Attackers on Block
flavourText: Forge your Perseverance on the Anvil of Faith.

name: Kraken Crest
implicitMods: 7% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage
12% of Fire Damage taken Recouped as Life
explicitMods: Socketed Gems deal 30% more Damage while on Low Life
craftedMods: +1 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems
fracturedMods: Socketed Gems deal 30% more Elemental Damage

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Physical, Fire, Nova

socketedItems.secDescrText: An expanding wave of energy surges outwards from you, damaging enemies in a ring-shaped area over a duration. The ring then returns, damaging enemies again on the way back. Only one Wave of Conviction can be active at a time
explicitMods: Damage Penetrates 15% of Enemy Elemental Resistances
50% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Targets a corpse, causing it to explode, dealing fire damage. The explosion is not affected by modifiers to spell damage and cannot be reflected. Cannot target corpses that have been created by skills.
explicitMods: Explosion deals base Fire Damage equal to 34.5% of the corpse's Maximum Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Explosion deals base Fire Damage equal to 7.9% of the corpse's Maximum Life
30% chance to detonate an additional corpse
hybrid.secDescrText: Targets a corpse, and deals spell damage to enemies around the corpse, as well as causing the corpse to explode, dealing fire damage. The explosion is not affected by modifiers to spell damage and cannot be reflected. This will continue to target other corpses in the area, with an increasing delay between each one, until it runs out of corpses or has destroyed 22 corpses.

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance

descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Flaming bolts rain down over the targeted area. They explode when landing, dealing damage to nearby enemies.
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a sudden burst of cold in a targeted area, damaging enemies. Also creates an expanding area which is filled with chilled ground, and deals cold damage over time to enemies. Enemies that die while in the area have a chance to grant Frenzy Charges. The cooldown can be bypassed by expending a Frenzy Charge.
explicitMods: Deals 2608.8 Base Cold Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
Chilled Ground Base initial radius is 1.5 metres
Chilled Ground Base final radius is 3 metres
25% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge when an Enemy Dies while in this Skill's Area
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Raises necromantic energies into the sky above a targeted location, where they coalesce into a zombie minion. The minion then attacks by falling to the ground, causing an impact that deals damage in an area. The zombie cannot survive the impact.
